thickness.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the divider component for the rule thickness: md.comp.divider.thickness, 1dp.

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the divider component for the rule: md.sys.color.outline-variant (ki.outline.med-em precedent from the ki-tabs divider).

radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the divider component for the end caps: M3 dividers are square-ended rules, no cap treatment.

spacing.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the divider component for the gutter: M3 dividers carry no built-in gutter — spacing comes from the surrounding layout (FR-007 allows a zero gutter).
